# Product Listing Policy

This policy explains how vendors create and maintain product listings on ShopEase so that customers receive accurate, trustworthy information.

## Creating a Listing

- Use the seller dashboard to add a product. Required fields are: title, category, description, price, inventory quantity, and at least one image.
- Titles must describe the actual product concisely. Do not include promotional text, seller names, or unrelated keywords in the title.
- Descriptions must be accurate and must not make misleading or unverifiable claims.

## Images

- Provide clear images on a clean background. The main image must show the actual product being sold.
- Minimum recommended resolution is 1000x1000 pixels so customers can zoom.
- Do not use watermarks, borders, promotional badges, or competitor branding.

## Pricing

- Prices must reflect the true selling price. Do not list artificially inflated reference prices.
- You are responsible for charging applicable taxes where required.
- Discounts configured through flash sales apply only to your own products.

## Categorisation and Variations

- Place each product in the most specific, accurate category. Mis-categorisation may reduce visibility or be corrected by ShopEase.
- Group genuine variations (size, colour) under the appropriate parent product rather than duplicating listings.

## Prohibited Listing Practices

- Duplicate listings of the same product to gain more visibility.
- Listing a product you do not own or are not authorised to sell.
- Manipulating search, reviews, or ratings.

Violations may result in listing removal, suppressed search visibility, or account review.
